name: ckm_unitarity_3x3
formula: V V^dagger = 1 from GCT angles (s12=phi^-3(1-5alpha), s23=phi^-(6+phi^-1), s13=phi^-(11+phi^-1), delta_CP=2pi/phi)

extra.note: CKM 3x3 unitarity from GCT angles. Max row-norm residual: 0.00000; max off-diagonal residual: 0.00000; |det V|: 1.00000. Consistent with unitarity to ~1% (driven by individual angle residuals).
